name: Gregory W. Robertson
title: Undergraduate Student at UCLA
affiliation: College of Letters and Science, Department of Economics
bio: I am an undergraduate student at UCLA pursuing a B.A. in Business Economics (GPA 4.0, expected June 2029). My interests include investment analysis, behavioral economics, and the intersection of technology and society.

I have research experience in social media data collection and analysis through work with the Stanford Cyber Policy Center, and have developed skills in Python, LaTeX, and quantitative research methods.
Outside of academics, I am a Mandarin Chinese speaker (California Seal of Biliteracy), a former varsity golf team captain, and a taekwondo black belt.
